content: [{"id": "header", "type": "header", "data": {"text": "Fleet Management", "col": 12}}, {"id": "quick_stats", "type": "number_card", "data": {"number_card_name": "Fleet Overview", "col": 12, "cards": [{"name": "Total Vehicles", "label": "Total Vehicles", "function": "Count", "aggregate_function_based_on": "Fleet Vehicle", "filters": [["Fleet Vehicle", "status", "=", "Active"]], "color": "Blue"}, {"name": "Active Drivers", "label": "Active Drivers", "function": "Count", "aggregate_function_based_on": "Fleet Driver", "filters": [["Fleet Driver", "status", "=", "ACTIVE"]], "color": "Green"}, {"name": "Scheduled Shifts", "label": "Scheduled Shifts", "function": "Count", "aggregate_function_based_on": "Fleet Shift", "filters": [["Fleet Shift", "status", "=", "SCHEDULED"]], "color": "Orange"}, {"name": "Maintenance Due", "label": "Maintenance Due", "function": "Count", "aggregate_function_based_on": "Fleet Vehicle", "filters": [["Fleet Vehicle", "next_maintenance_date", "<=", "Today"]], "color": "Red"}]}}, {"id": "fleet_section", "type": "header", "data": {"text": "Fleet Operations", "col": 12}}, {"id": "fleet_shortcuts", "type": "shortcut", "data": {"shortcut_name": "Fleet Management", "col": 6, "shortcuts": [{"label": "Vehicles", "name": "Fleet Vehicle", "type": "DocType", "icon": "truck", "color": "blue"}, {"label": "Drivers", "name": "Fleet Driver", "type": "DocType", "icon": "user", "color": "green"}, {"label": "Shifts", "name": "Fleet Shift", "type": "DocType", "icon": "clock", "color": "purple"}, {"label": "Projects", "name": "Fleet Project", "type": "DocType", "icon": "briefcase", "color": "orange"}]}}, {"id": "fleet_chart", "type": "chart", "data": {"chart_name": "Vehicle Status Distribution", "col": 6, "chart_type": "Donut", "filters": [], "based_on": "status", "document_type": "Fleet Vehicle", "group_by_type": "Count", "time_interval": "Yearly", "timespan": "Last Year", "color": "Blue"}}, {"id": "maintenance_section", "type": "header", "data": {"text": "Maintenance & Fuel", "col": 12}}, {"id": "maintenance_shortcuts", "type": "shortcut", "data": {"shortcut_name": "Maintenance & Fuel", "col": 6, "shortcuts": [{"label": "Maintenance Entries", "name": "Maintenance Entry", "type": "DocType", "icon": "tool", "color": "orange"}, {"label": "Fuel Entries", "name": "Fuel Entry", "type": "DocType", "icon": "droplet", "color": "blue"}, {"label": "Supplier Contracts", "name": "Supplier Contract", "type": "DocType", "icon": "file-text", "color": "green"}]}}, {"id": "maintenance_chart", "type": "chart", "data": {"chart_name": "Monthly Maintenance Costs", "col": 6, "chart_type": "Bar", "filters": [], "based_on": "maintenance_date", "document_type": "Maintenance Entry", "group_by_type": "Sum", "group_by_based_on": "cost", "time_interval": "Monthly", "timespan": "Last 6 months", "color": "Orange"}}, {"id": "admin_section", "type": "header", "data": {"text": "Administration", "col": 12}}, {"id": "admin_shortcuts", "type": "shortcut", "data": {"shortcut_name": "Administration", "col": 6, "shortcuts": [{"label": "Branches", "name": "Fleet Branch", "type": "DocType", "icon": "map-pin", "color": "blue"}, {"label": "Cities", "name": "Fleet City", "type": "DocType", "icon": "globe", "color": "green"}, {"label": "Cost Calculator", "name": "Cost Calculation Engine", "type": "DocType", "icon": "calculator", "color": "purple"}, {"label": "Access Logs", "name": "Fleet Access Log", "type": "DocType", "icon": "shield", "color": "red"}]}}, {"id": "admin_chart", "type": "chart", "data": {"chart_name": "Fleet Performance Trends", "col": 6, "chart_type": "Line", "filters": [], "based_on": "shift_date", "document_type": "Fleet Shift", "group_by_type": "Count", "time_interval": "Weekly", "timespan": "Last 3 months", "color": "Green"}}]
